ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: Primitive Defenses Subscale: I am a ''hero worshiper'' even if I am later found wrong in my judgment
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I feel that people I once thought highly of have disappointed me by not living up to what I expected of them
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I feel it has been a long time since anyone really taught or told me anything I did not already know
Primitive Defenses Subscale: It is hard for me to trust people because they so often turn against me or betray me
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I need to admire people in order to feel secure

Primitive Defenses Subscale: I find myself doing things which at other times I think are not too wise like having promiscuous sex, lying, drinking, having temper tantrums or breaking the law in minor ways
Primitive Defenses Subscale: People tell me I have difficulty in seeing shortcomings in those I admire
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I feel I don't get what I want
Primitive Defenses Subscale: People tell me I behave in contradictory ways
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I think people are basically either good or bad: there are few who are really in between
Primitive Defenses Subscale: People tend to use me unless I watch out for it
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I act in ways that appear to others as unpredictable and erratic
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I have favorite people whom I not only admire, but almost idealize
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I find myself doing things which feel okay while I am doing them but which I later find hard to believe I did
Primitive Defenses Subscale: People tend to respond to me by either overwhelming me with love or abandoning me.
Primitive Defenses Subscale: I tend to feel things in a somewhat extreme way, experiencing either great joy or intense despair.
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I feel like a fake or imposter, that others see me as quite different from the way I really am
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I feel I am a different person at home as compared to how I am at work or at school
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I feel that my tastes and opinions are not really my own, but have been borrowed from other people
Identity Diffusion Subscale: Some of my friends would be surprised if they knew how differently I behave in different situations
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I fluctuate between being warm and giving at some times, and being cold and indifferent at other times
Identity Diffusion Subscale: People tell me I provoke or mislead them so as to get my way

Identity Diffusion Subscale: I get into relationships with people I don't really like because it's hard for me to say no.
Identity Diffusion Subscale: My life, if it were a book, seems to me more like a series of short stories written by different authors than like a long novel
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I pick up hobbies and interests and then drop them
Identity Diffusion Subscale: When others see me as having succeeded, I'm elated and, when they see me as failing, I feel devastated
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I am afraid that people who become important to me will suddenly change in their feelings towards me
Identity Diffusion Subscale: It is hard for me to be sure about what others think of me, even people who have known me very well
Identity Diffusion Subscale: Being alone is difficult for me
Identity Diffusion Subscale: I see myself in totally different ways at different times
Identity Diffusion Subscale: In the course of an intimate relationship, I'm afraid of losing a sense of myself
Identity Diffusion Subscale: My life goals change frequently from year to year
Identity Diffusion Subscale: My goals keep changing
Identity Diffusion Subscale: After becoming involved with people, I am surprised to find out what they are really like
Identity Diffusion Subscale: Even people who know me well cannot guess how I'm going to behave.
Reality Testing Subscale: When everything around me is unsettled and confused, I feel that way inside
Reality Testing Subscale: I am not sure whether a voice I have heard, or something that I have seen is my imagination or not
Reality Testing Subscale: When I'm nervous or confused, it seems like things in the outside world don't make sense either
Reality Testing Subscale: I feel almost as if I'm someone else, like a friend or relative, or even someone I don't know
Reality Testing Subscale: I think I see things which, when I take a closer look, turn out to be something else
Reality Testing Subscale: When I am uncomfortable, I can't tell whether it is emotional or physical
Reality Testing Subscale: I can see things or hear things that nobody else can see or hear
Reality Testing Subscale: I hear things that other people claim are not really there
Reality Testing Subscale: I have heard or seen things when there is no apparent reason for it
Reality Testing Subscale: I find that I do things which get other people upset and I don't know why such things upset them
Reality Testing Subscale: I can't tell whether certain physical sensations I'm having are real, or whether I am imagining them
Reality Testing Subscale: I feel that my wishes or thoughts will come true as if by magic
Reality Testing Subscale: People see me as being rude or inconsiderate, and I don't know why
Reality Testing Subscale: I understand and know things that nobody else is able to understand or know
Reality Testing Subscale: I know that I cannot tell others certain things about the world that I understand but that to others would appear crazy
Reality Testing Subscale: I have seen things which do not exist in reality
Reality Testing Subscale: I feel as if I have been somewhere or done something before when I really haven't
Reality Testing Subscale: I can't tell whether I simply want something to be true, or whether it really is true
Reality Testing Subscale: I believe that things will happen simply by thinking about them
Reality Testing Subscale: Somehow, I never know quite how to conduct myself with people
